songs.title: It's A (Potato)
songs.lyrics:
[Intro — whispered]
a… a… a…

[Hook 1 — kids chant]
A! A! It's a… (what?)
A! A! It's a… (what?)
It's a mat! It's a mat!
It's a mat, mat, mat!

[Hook 2 — kids chant]
A! A! It's a… (what?)
A! A! It's a… (what?)
It's a cup! It's a cup!
It's a cup, cup, cup!

[Breakdown — whispered, bass drops out]
a… a… a…
it's a… it's a… it's a…

[Hook 3 — kids chant]
A! A! It's a… (what?)
A! A! It's a… (what?)
It's a chair! It's a chair!
It's a chair, chair, chair!

[Final Hook — big]
A! A! It's a… (what?)
A! A! It's a… (what?)
It's a POTATO!
POTATO! POTATO!
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: 🚨 W1 EXCEPTION: this single track covers BOTH the sound-song and word-song roles — 'a' IS the sound and the word, so Week 1 ships only one song (every week from W2 on ships two). ONE pattern, ~10 unique words, same melody every hook, one word swapped. The frame stays PURE — no apple/ant/alligator in this track and no a/an talk; the vowel chant lives in the daily Bingo Vowel Song ritual (unplugged, sung at the vowel wall — 'A-E-I-O-U, A-E-I-O-U, A-E-I-O-U'), and the a/an collision lives only in the Wednesday pocket sort. Never mix the three.

a potato wearing tiny round glasses standing at a miniature whiteboard with a pointer, teaching, deadpan

extras: vowel wall A·E·I·O·U cards (blue letters, gold star held back for light-up weeks)
a/an wall pockets + 11 picture cards (red-dot self-correction on backs)

teacherFocus: Run the naming frame ('It's a ___') and the pure /ă/ sound game as two SEPARATE rituals all week — they collide on purpose only at Wednesday's a/an pocket sort, never mid-sentence anywhere else.
